title: LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS - 211info
text: CITY OF SALEM LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a way for residents to file complaints against the local police department. 440 Church Street SE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 588-6123 1 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 588-7272 Main phone (503) 588-7272 Alternate Customer Service Center Main phone (503) 588-6123 ext 1 Police Supervisor Alternate (503) 588-6160 Office of Professional Standards Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or walk in for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Salem Services: Law Enforcement Complaints Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF SALEM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - COMMUNITY PLANNING AND DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF SALEM
